title: Tricholaena eichingeri
taxonomy: Tricholaena eichingeri is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to Australia and has been classified as a part of the genus Tricholaena. Tricholaena eichingeri is further grouped into the subfamily Panicoideae. The classification of Tricholaena eichingeri is also supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf and spikelet structure. This classification is in line with the latest available botanical research and taxonomic classification.
